name: Unified Draw Notifier (EE + OINP + BC PNP)

parameters.content:
## Unified Draw System

**Social branch** (every 15 min): fetches EE + OINP + BC PNP + Alberta AAIP, dedups via `posted_draws`, auto-posts to Telegram, X, LinkedIn, Instagram. Alberta is scraped directly from alberta.ca (no Apps Script needed).

**WordPress branch** (hourly, bottom): fetches the unified endpoint (EE + 9 provinces), fingerprint-gated — only rewrites the page when draw data changed.

**Before enabling:** (1) paste logo into `LOGO_B64` in **Build Story Card**; (2) fill the 3 constants in **Update WordPress Page**; (3) deactivate the old EE / BC PNP-OINP / WordPress flows to avoid duplicates.
